spells.name: Magic Missile
spells.description: Three glowing darts of magical force strike your target unerringly.

spells.name: Cure Wounds
spells.description: You touch a creature, channeling positive energy to heal wounds.

spells.name: Shield
spells.description: An invisible barrier of magical force appears, protecting you.

spells.name: Fireball
spells.description: A bright streak flashes to a point you choose within range and explodes in a roar of flame.

spells.name: Lightning Bolt
spells.description: A stroke of lightning forming a line lashes out from you in a direction you choose.

spells.name: Cure Serious Wounds
spells.description: You channel powerful healing energy into a creature you touch.

spells.name: Haste
spells.description: You speed up an ally's movements and reactions.

spells.name: Shocking Grasp
spells.description: Lightning springs from your hand to deliver a shock to a creature you try to touch.

spells.name: Ice Storm
spells.description: A hail of rock-hard ice pounds to the ground in a cylinder.

spells.name: Stoneskin
spells.description: Until the spell ends, one willing creature you touch has resistance to nonmagical damage.

spells.name: Mass Cure Wounds
spells.description: A wave of healing energy washes out from a point of your choice.

spells.name: Cone of Cold
spells.description: A blast of cold air erupts from your hands.

spells.name: Flame Strike
spells.description: A vertical column of divine fire roars down from the heavens.

spells.name: Bless
spells.description: You bless up to three creatures of your choice within range.

spells.name: Hold Person
spells.description: You paralyze a humanoid you can see within range.
